page_title: Attack on Titan: Before the Fall 2 (Novel)
text:
is the second of three light novels, in the Attack on Titan: Before the Fall novel series. It is written by Ryō Suzukaze and illustrated by Thores Shibamoto. It was given an English release by on May 26, 2015 in a compilation novel titled Attack on Titan: Kuklo Unbound that combined Attack on Titan: Before the Fall 2 and Attack on Titan: Before the Fall 3.

The novel along with the other Before the Fall novels would later be adapted into a manga series by Satoshi Shiki.

Plot

Fifteen years after Mammon's attack on Shiganshina District, the "Titan's Son" Kuklo desires to free himself from his captivity and from the burden of being known as the Titan's Son. With the help of Sharle Inocencio, Kuklo sets out to see a Titan for himself as proof that he himself is truly not one of them.

Trivia

In the English compilation book Attack on Titan: Kuklo Unbound, the "Epilogue" chapter of this novel was redesignated as "Intermission" due to the immediate continuation of the story.
